heading: Supplements to Federal grant programs
label: 2009aa–3 Supplements to Federal grant programs
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in subsec. (c)(2)(A), refers to the Agricultural Act of 1961, , , . For classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables. However, the reference was probably intended to be “this title” meaning the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act, title III of , as amended, which is classified principally to this chapter. For classification of this title to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 87–12875 Stat. 294section 1911 of this titlePub. L. 87–128section 1921 of this titleAug. 8, 1961
Amendments2002— reenacted section catchline without change and amended text generally to clarify provisions relating to supplements to Federal grant programs.Pub. L. 107–171

Waiver of Requirements Relating to Non-Federal Cost-Share Grants and Cooperative Agreements for the Delta Regional Authority, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. D, title V, § 505(a)134 Stat. 1379Dec. 27, 2020“Requirements relating to non-Federal cost-share grants and cooperative agreements for the Delta Regional Authority under section 382D of the Agricultural Act of 1961 and Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act () are waived for grants awarded in fiscal year 2020 and in subsequent years in response to economic distress directly related to the impacts of the Coronavirus Disease (COVID–19).”7 U.S.C. 2009aa–3

children.text: the States or communities lack the economic resources to provide the required matching share; or
there are insufficient funds available under the applicable Federal law authorizing the Federal grant program to meet pressing needs of the region.
may increase the Federal share of the costs of a project under the Federal grant program to not more than 90 percent (except as provided in ); andsection 2009aa–5(b) of this title
shall use amounts made available to carry out this subchapter to pay the increased Federal share.

children.label: A
children.text: meets (except as provided in subsection (b)) the applicable requirements of the applicable Federal grant program; and

children.label: B
children.text: could be approved for Federal contribution under the Federal grant program if funds were available under the law for the project.

children.label: ii
children.text: shall be accepted by the Federal agencies.

children.heading: Acceptance by Federal cochairperson
children.label: B Acceptance by Federal cochairperson
children.text: In the case of any project described in paragraph (1), any finding, report, certification, or documentation required to be submitted with respect to the project to the head of the department, agency, or instrumentality of the Federal Government responsible for the administration of the Federal grant program under which the project is carried out shall be accepted by the Federal cochairperson.
